title: A 'Printed Circuit' With FWG Conductive Ink - A Stylophone
description:
That was fun - the ink can be got here
https://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/working-ink-ink/
IPA is isopropanol alcohol
PET is polyethylenetetraphtalate - or overhead acetate - but it works well on lots of plastics
It might well be interesting to try silk screen printing as well as the method i used as the basic idea works for sure
